purpose: Verify documents through claim-source support, contradiction checks, audience fit, actionability, currentness, and decision clarity.
verificationAxes: material claims map to sources or accepted assumptions
terms, decisions, and owners are defined
contradictions and unresolved questions are surfaced
reader, use case, and actionability are aligned

blindSpotPatterns.description: Document verifier passes persuasive prose without checking claim support or assumptions.
blindSpotPatterns.detector: Verdict lacks claim-source table or accepted-assumption list.

blindSpotPatterns.description: Document verifier checks grammar but misses whether the intended reader can act on the document.
blindSpotPatterns.detector: Evidence lacks audience/use-case fit, decisions, owner, or action list.

repairStrategy: Repair the document by adding sources, assumptions, decisions, definitions, owners, or reader-specific structure.
improveStrategy: Add claim-source, contradiction, currentness, or audience-fit requirement to the verifier harness.

sampleTasks.description: Verify a PRD or report for supported claims, contradictions, reader fit, and decisions.
